heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1134d Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated $30,000,000 for fiscal year 2009 and each of the five succeeding fiscal years to carry out this subpart.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 1134k–1 of this titlePub.
